title: Collapse obsolete total-format wrappers
natural_prompt: Replace the invoice and receipt total-format wrapper functions with one shared formatAmount helper, and call that helper directly from both summaries.
prompt: Replace the invoice and receipt total-format wrapper functions with one shared formatAmount helper, and call that helper directly from both summaries.
success_criteria: Invoice and receipt summaries still render dollar totals
Both summaries call the shared formatAmount helper directly
overbuild_risks: Keeping obsolete wrapper exports despite the request
